tagline: AI-powered customer communication platform for small businesses

challenge.headline: Missed calls mean lost customers for small businesses
challenge.description: Small businesses couldn't respond to every inquiry in real time — after-hours calls went unanswered and potential customers moved on. Communication across multiple channels lacked a unified view, making consistency and visibility nearly impossible.

result.headline: 24/7 availability, zero missed opportunities
result.quote: Zinng AI transformed how small businesses approach customer communication by helping them stay connected, responsive, and better equipped to serve their customers.
